playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James drives through Los Angeles with BLACKPINK playing their hits and sharing stories. He receives a krumping tutorial, and the band discusses their experiences with the training system that led to BLACKPINK's formation.
playlist.title: BLACKPINK Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: BTS has performed at some of the world's biggest venues and stages, but James Corden has introduced a new setting for the international sensation: the crosswalk at Beverly Blvd. and Genesee Ave. Watch as the group captivates fans and Los Angeles commuters with performances of their hit songs "Butter," "Permission to Dance," and "Dynamite."
playlist.title: BTS Performs a Concert in the Crosswalk

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden hits the carpool lane with international superstars BTS to sing songs off their new album "Map of the Soul: 7" and cover Bruno Mars' "Finesse (Remix) (feat. Cardi B)" and "Circles" by Post Malone, before finally taking a detour to a PLYOJAM dance class.
playlist.title: BTS Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden asks his friend Meghan Trainor to help him get to work, and together they sing some of Meghan's biggest hits. Just then, Dr. Phil surprises them, and Meghan finds it challenging to maintain her composure. Spoiler alert: Dr. Phil is all about that bass.
playlist.title: Meghan Trainor Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden and Billie Eilish get into the car and head for the carpool lane, singing "Ocean Eyes," "bad guy," and "all the good girls go to hell." After James asks Billie about her first meeting with Justin Bieber, she plays some tunes on the ukulele. They then take a detour to visit her home and meet her pet spider. The two conclude their trip by singing "when the party's over".
playlist.title: Billie Eilish Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden travels to Las Vegas for a special primetime Carpool Karaoke segment on CBS and invites Céline Dion to join him. As they navigate the city, they sing Céline’s classic hits, and she showcases her ability to have a song for every occasion. James introduces Céline to “Baby Shark,” and together they give away some of Céline's treasured shoes. The afternoon concludes with a spectacular surprise reminiscent of Titanic.
playlist.title: Céline Dion Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden and Michael Bublé carpool through Los Angeles, singing both Michael's new music and his classic songs. During their ride, they engage in an emotional conversation about the devastation caused by a cancer diagnosis and discuss how individuals can help find a cure.
playlist.title: Michael Bublé  Carpool Karaoke - Stand Up To Cancer

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James and Ariana Grande drive across Los Angeles, singing songs from her new album "Sweetener," channeling some Celine Dion, and settling the debate on whether Ariana is physically carried wherever she goes (she isn't).
playlist.title: Ariana Grande Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden travels to Liverpool for a special day with Paul McCartney. They explore the city of Paul’s youth, visiting his childhood home where he and John Lennon wrote music together. They also perform songs in a local pub and, of course, drive around while singing some of Paul’s biggest hits.
playlist.title: Paul McCartney Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden takes full advantage of Christina Aguilera by asking her for vocal and diva coaching to help him get to work, while Melissa McCarthy joins in to completely nail Redman's verse in "Dirrty."
playlist.title: Christina Aguilera Carpool Karaoke - Extended Cut

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James gets commuting help from P!nk, driving around Los Angeles and singing her classics. They end up upside down to prove that singing upside down is possible.
playlist.title: P!nk Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James recruits Sam Smith to help him navigate the carpool lane in Los Angeles. During the ride, Sam reveals that James was one of the first celebrities to notice and promote his music. To everyone's surprise, Fifth Harmony joins them in the car to perform a special song.
playlist.title: Carpool Karaoke w/ Sam Smith ft. Fifth Harmony

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James and Ed Sheeran take a drive in Los Angeles, singing songs from Ed's new album. After hearing that Ed once fit 47 Maltesers in his mouth, James challenges him to try to fit as many as he can.
playlist.title: Ed Sheeran Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: As part of his duties for #LateLateStyles week, Harry assists James in getting to work by singing songs from his new album, trying out some bold outfits, and incorporating famous lines from "Titanic" and "Notting Hill."
playlist.title: Harry Styles Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden and Bruno Mars drive through Los Angeles, singing hits from the new album "24K Magic" and chatting about topics ranging from Elvis to poker.
playlist.title: Bruno Mars Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: Lady Gaga joins James for a drive through Los Angeles, singing her classic songs and tracks from her new album, "Joanne." Afterward, James tries on some of her iconic looks and lets her take the wheel.
playlist.title: Lady Gaga Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James and Britney Spears carpool through Los Angeles, singing her biggest hits and chatting about their lives.
playlist.title: Britney Spears Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden's tour of the White House takes an unexpected turn when First Lady Michelle Obama joins him for a drive around the grounds, singing songs by Stevie Wonder and Beyoncé.
playlist.title: First Lady Michelle Obama Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James invites Anthony Kiedis, Flea, Chad Smith, and Josh Klinghoffer from the Red Hot Chili Peppers to carpool around Los Angeles. This leads to a wrestling match and the debut of "Heemi Lheemey."
playlist.title: Red Hot Chili Peppers Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden and Jennifer Lopez carpool to CBS, singing some of her most popular songs before James takes Jennifer's phone and texts a message to Leonardo DiCaprio.
playlist.title: Jennifer Lopez Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James Corden invites Elton John to help him navigate Los Angeles on a rainy day while they sing some of his songs, including a classic from The Lion King and "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me."
playlist.title: Elton John Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: While driving, James Corden sees Chris Martin seeking a ride to San Francisco for the Super Bowl halftime show with Coldplay.
playlist.title: Chris Martin Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James and rock legend Rod Stewart carpool through Los Angeles, singing some of his classic songs. Surprise guest A$AP Rocky joins in for his hit "Everyday."
playlist.title: Rod Stewart & A$AP Rocky Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James and Justin Bieber carpool through Los Angeles, singing some of Justin's classic songs. James also challenges him to finish a Rubik's Cube.
playlist.title: Justin Bieber Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: James and Jennifer Hudson enjoy their commute by singing classic tunes, visiting her star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame, and ordering from a drive-thru.
playlist.title: Jennifer Hudson Carpool Karaoke

playlist.author: The Late Late Show with James Corden
playlist.description: While driving around Los Angeles, James and Mariah Carey entertain themselves by singing some familiar songs, including "Always Be My Baby."
playlist.title: Mariah Carey Carpool Karaoke
